note: Web wallet capsule hotfix in website/js/security.js. NO consensus/RPC/schema change. Adds byte-accurate capsule counter overlay, web Document Reference file picker + browser SHA-256 (hash/size/locator only; no upload), public capsule sendmany for Open Note / Structured Data / Certification / Document Reference by attaching the same public payload to every payment output and never to change, and a 16,000-byte standard tx preflight for both single and multi-recipient sends. Sealed/encrypted Capsule modes remain PLANNED because they require recipient public keys and one ECIES envelope per recipient. Force-reload wallet tabs (Ctrl+Shift+R).
